OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion:
Managing discussions about healthcare topics like COVID vaccines can be tricky, especially when you're not an expert. Having a background as someone who's moderately agreeable but also quite neurotic means that I try to stay calm during debates while being careful not to offend others.

I'm currently living in Rome and working as a retail worker part-time; this gives me practical experience with people every day, so handling conversations feels natural for me. My parents have different levels of education – my father has a PhD, which is impressive even though I don't share his intellectual curiosity much myself since my own openness to new things is quite low according to that personality test.

When dealing with vaccine discussions online or in person (which happen from time-to-time given my social media habits), I always remember being an atheist means I shouldn't rely too heavily on religious arguments, but rather stick strictly to scientific evidence. It's important to me not just to present facts correctly because of my high agreeableness score showing good empathy skills – I want people to feel heard even when they might disagree scientifically.

But since my neuroticism level is pretty high at 86 out of 100, any controversial discussion makes me a bit anxious. That's why before opening up about these topics more publicly than usual with friends or colleagues during work hours, I usually do some quick research using reliable sources like WHO guidelines.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Based on my low openness and moderate conscientiousness traits combined with being an atheist retail worker living in Rome who spends limited time online but engages in discussions about COVID vaccines. My high agreeableness makes me prioritize harmony over confrontation, while my high neuroticism means I need to stay calm by relying on scientific evidence from authoritative sources.
